## Apple schedules Q3 2026 earnings call for July 30

July 30 is now the key near-term date for AAPL. Given the AVGO chip deal extension through 2031 (cluster 44d94cf3), the earnings call will be watched for any color on Apple Silicon roadmap and AI features cadence — both directly relevant to the AVGO relationship.

- Apple set its fiscal Q3 2026 earnings conference call for July 30 — no financial data disclosed.
- Calendar event: marks the date for AI-services commentary, iPhone demand update, and potential AI monetization guidance.
- No pre-announcements or guidance changes indicated in the headline.
